title: Double Dragon Address Labels | 250 Labels/Roll | 89mm x 36mm | Self-Adhesive White Stickers | BPA-Free | Handwriting, Laser & Inkjet Printer Compatible | For Shipping, Filing, Storage & Food Container
features: ✅ OPTIMAL LABEL SIZE: Each label measures 89 x 36 mm, making them the perfect choice for shipping, return addresses, barcodes, filing, and identification. The versatile size ensures they fit a wide range of mailing and organizational needs without wasting space.

✅ Handwriting & Printer Compatible – Works seamlessly with both laser and inkjet printers and is also suitable for handwriting. Labels produce smudge-free text and crisp barcodes, ensuring clear, professional results for bulk business printing or home use. (Not compatible with thermal printers.)
✅ STRONG ADHESIVE: Equipped with a high-quality adhesive backing, these labels stay firmly in place during mailing and handling.

✅ EASY DISPENSER BOX PACKAGING: Each roll is neatly packed in a dispenser box that keeps labels protected and makes them easy to apply. This ensures tangle-free use, and hassle-free storage when not in use.

✅ PREMIUM, ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIAL: Made from durable paper with a white surface, these labels deliver professional-grade results. BPA-free, recyclable, and vegan-friendly, they are safe for everyday use and environmentally responsible. Resistant to smudging, scratches, and fading, they ensure a clean, polished appearance even during shipping and storage.

✅ DOUBLE DRAGON LEGACY OF TRUST: Backed by the Double Dragon reputation for reliability and quality, these labels combine performance with long-lasting value. Trusted by businesses and individuals alike, Double Dragon continues to deliver office essentials that don’t compromise on quality.
